arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich prospect eager to take the pitch with FC Augsburg against his old club
arts.sum: In an interview with Abendzeitung journalist Kilian Kreitmair (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), former Bayern Munich prospect and current FC Augsburg attacker Yusuf Kabadayı said that he was eager to face his former club. We want to play a good game.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: PSG could be player for Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich and Sporting CP’s Viktor Gyökeres; Liverpool taking close look at Real Madrid star?; Erling Haaland getting new deal from Manchester City?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could still be a major player for Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich despite the presence of the Bavarians, Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, and maybe even clubs like Manchester City and Manchester United into the bidding circle: Paris Saint-Germain have shown strong interest in Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich in recent months, with reports from Germany revealing that a move almost happened this past summer.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl reveals Bayern Munich’s winter plans
arts.sum: Bayern Munich executive Max EBerl confirmed a rumor that had been floating around for quite a while —- the team will not be traveling for its winter training camp. One of the benefits of Bayern Munich’s reduced travel plans could be more time for the front office to work on contract extensions for several key players.

arts.ttl: Konrad Laimer set to maintain right-back berth as Leon Goretzka looks to make midfield comeback against FC Augsburg
arts.sum: In the case of Boey and Stanišić’s injury woes, Konrad Laimer is set to gain by securing a starting spot at right-back. That’s why the Austrian is set to continue playing at right-back, while Leon Goretzka is on the verge of his second start in a row in midfield against Augsburg tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich draw Vålerenga but sail through to UEFA Women’s Champions League knockouts!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich fell to a late 1-1 draw on the road Thursday at Vålerenga, but nonetheless qualified for the UEFA Women’s Champions League quarterfinals with two matches to spare. While Bayern settled for near sensational moments and narrowly missed passes, Vålerenga turned on the gas and hit the Bavarians for two of the game’s best chances.

arts.ttl: Lothar Matthäus feels Bayern Munich should spare no expenses with new Jamal Musiala deal
arts.sum: He is absolutely worth his weight in gold for both Bayern and the German national team and it should come with great elation that Sky Sport journalist Florian Plettenberg is now reporting that the plan for Musiala and the club is to sign an extension that would keep him at the club through 2029. For Matthäus, Musiala is already in the category of some of club’s greats like himself, Robert Lewandowski, Manuel Neuer, Franz Beckenbauer, and others that have historically been in and amongst the club’s top earners.

arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie takes jab at his Aberdeen cynics as skipper points to Harry Kane example
arts.sum: The captain has taken some stick despite a flying start to the season for the Dons

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Manuel Neuer suffering from rib ailment
arts.sum: Manuel Neuer did not train with the team today and only worked indoors due to rib problems. According to a report from Bild (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer did not train with the team on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany fully confident in Leon Goretzka
arts.sum: With injuries to midfielders João Palhinha and Aleksandar Pavlović, some might think that Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is sweating who might start next Joshua Kimmich against FC Augsburg. “Leon is a total professional and that’s why it’s a very clear, very simple decision for me to say: OK, we’ll just carry on [with Goretzka], because we trusted the player 100%.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Augsburg preview: Leaders looking to maintain unbeaten record
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to maintain their unbeaten Bundesliga record when they welcome Augsburg to the Allianz Arena on Friday.
